name: Courtier en assurance
definition: An insurance broker is an intermediary who sells, solicits, or negotiates insurance on behalf of a client for compensation.

name: Sociologue
definition: Sociology is the scientific study of human society that focuses on society, human social behavior, patterns of social relationships, social interaction, and aspects of culture associated with everyday life

name: Psychologue social
definition: In sociology, social psychology (also known as sociological social psychology) studies the relationship between the individual and society.

name: Rabbin
definition: A rabbi is a spiritual leader or religious teacher in Judaism.
